name: Suntar Eco-City Limited
summary: Suntar Eco-City Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the eco-tourism and property development activities in the People's Republic of China. It is also involved in the medical research and development activities; sale of healthcare products and nanophase materials; and provision of technical and investment consulting services. The company was formerly known as Reyphon Agriceutical Limited and changed its name to Suntar Eco-City Limited in June 2012. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Singapore. Suntar Eco-City Limited is a subsidiary of Suntar Investment Pte. Ltd.
